_info.description: Tunable parameter reference for the 7-stage ComfyUI anime wallpaper pipeline.
_info.usage: Edit values here, then mirror them into the corresponding node inputs in workflow_api.json. Node IDs are cross-referenced in each section.

clip_vision.notes: ViT-H is recommended for SDXL IP-Adapter. Requires models/clip_vision/ directory.

ipadapter.notes: Use ip-adapter-plus_xl.safetensors for stronger style transfer. Located in models/ipadapter/.

esrgan.notes: Place in models/upscale_models/. AnimeSharp recommended; Remacri if AnimeSharp over-sharpens thin outlines.

slot_2.notes: Reduce if colors look artificially pastel.

slot_3.notes: Reduce if texture noise bleeds into backgrounds.

face.notes: Use yolov8m (medium), not yolov8n (nano). Nano misses small faces in wide shots.

hand.notes: hand_yolov8s for hands only. person_yolov8m-seg for full-body anatomy correction.

stage_0_aesthetic_prior.notes: Disable Stage 0 by disconnecting node 15 (IPAdapterAdvanced) and wiring node 14 (FreeU) directly to the KSamplers.

ipadapter.notes: Above 0.45 suppresses character LoRAs. Below 0.20 is imperceptible.

sdxl_aesthetic_conditioning.notes: Aesthetic score is encoded implicitly via CLIPTextEncodeSDXL width/height parameters. Positive uses large dimensions (4096x4096) to signal high quality. Negative uses small dimensions (512x512) to signal low quality. This exploits SDXL's training-time size conditioning.

positive_prompt.text_g: masterpiece, best quality, ultra-detailed, 1girl, solo, hisato_azuma, school uniform, (dynamic angle:1.15), (wide shot:1.2), breathtaking fantasy landscape, vibrant colors, ray tracing, cinematic lighting, depth of field
positive_prompt.text_l: masterpiece, best quality, ultra-detailed, 1girl, solo, hisato_azuma, school uniform, (dynamic angle:1.15), (wide shot:1.2), breathtaking fantasy landscape, vibrant colors, ray tracing, cinematic lighting, depth of field

negative_prompt.text_g: lowres, bad anatomy, bad hands, text, error, missing fingers, extra digit, fewer digits, cropped, worst quality, low quality, normal quality, jpeg artifacts, signature, watermark, username, blurry, artist name, 3d, realistic
negative_prompt.text_l: lowres, bad anatomy, bad hands, text, error, missing fingers, extra digit, fewer digits, cropped, worst quality, low quality, normal quality, jpeg artifacts, signature, watermark, username, blurry, artist name, 3d, realistic

latent.notes: 1344x768 is the native SDXL 16:9 landscape resolution. Do not exceed this for base generation.

hires_pass_a.purpose: structural injection — hallucinates new fine detail

hires_pass_b.purpose: polish — removes aliasing without altering structure

vae_decode.tile_size_notes: 512 keeps peak VRAM under 6GB at 2016x1152. Lower to 256 on 8GB cards.

hand_detailer.notes: Run after face detailer (takes node 42 output, not node 40). Denoise intentionally lower than face — correct topology, do not regenerate the hand.

color_correction.notes: Never adjust hue — IXL color relationships are internally consistent. Saturation value is a multiplier (1.0 = no change).

unsharp_mask.notes: Apply before film grain. Grain on a blurry image looks wrong.

film_grain.notes: Add grain before ESRGAN upscale. Grain added after 4x upscale will look blocky due to pixel-level noise scaling.

esrgan_upscale.tiling_notes: Standard ImageUpscaleWithModel does not support tiling natively. For tiled inference install 'ComfyUI-Ultimate-SD-Upscale' and use the UltimateSDUpscale node, or patch ImageUpscaleWithModel. Recommended tile_size=512, overlap=32.

save.notes: ComfyUI saves as PNG by default (lossless). Output goes to ComfyUI/output/.

extensions_required.name: ComfyUI-Impact-Pack
extensions_required.notes: Also requires Ultralytics for YOLOv8. Install via: pip install ultralytics

extensions_required.name: ComfyUI-Ultimate-SD-Upscale (optional)
extensions_required.notes: Only needed if you want tiled ESRGAN inference. Not required for basic Stage 6 operation.

quick_troubleshooting.wrong_finger_counts: Verify node 43 model_name is hand_yolov8s.pt; lower node 44 bbox_threshold to 0.40
quick_troubleshooting.esrgan_out_of_vram: Install UltimateSDUpscale extension and switch node 61 to UltimateSDUpscale with tile_size=512
quick_troubleshooting.visible_tile_seams_in_4k: Increase overlap parameter to 48-64 in tiled upscale node
